consistency_checks: Cart status text says 'Your cart is empty.'
Presence of Checkout button despite empty cart.
Existing order summary shows a non-zero total ($12.50) unrelated to current empty cart.
No line items or quantities visible in cart.

decision.observation_summary: Product list with three items and their Add to cart buttons. Cart sidebar says 'Your cart is empty.' Yet an order card appears below with 'Order ord_db6cc37d - Total charged: $12.50'.
decision.reason: Quickly verify whether checkout proceeds even when the cart is empty and whether a new order is created, indicating inconsistent validation.
decision.reasoning: The cart explicitly states it is empty, but an order summary exists, implying prior successful checkout. Pressing Checkout again without adding items will test if the system improperly allows checkout and possibly generates another order or charges despite no items in cart.
